parity_goal: Route bounded CLI work through one portable skill with active and inactive provider nodes.

cases.prompt: $cli-subagents delegate a difficult implementation where quality matters
expected: routes to Codex Sol with medium or high effort

cases.prompt: $cli-subagents ask a second model to review the design and tone
expected: routes to Claude Fable with medium or high effort
keeps final judgment with the coordinator

cases.prompt: $cli-subagents use a cheap fast model to inspect screenshots
expected: uses a concrete current model ID
requires Claude or Codex oversight for consequential output
